strengths: Deep TypeScript and full-stack proficiency across frontend and backend, directly matching core technical requirements
AI/LLM and MCP integration experience at re:cinq satisfies the highest-value nice-to-have qualification
Berlin-based with 15+ years of professional delivery, including open-source GIS platform maintained solo on Kubernetes
concerns: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with ~17 years of experience — heavily overqualified for a Junior/Mid entry-level role
PostgreSQL is not evidenced; database work skews toward MongoDB and MySQL, leaving a gap in the preferred stack
No explicit Nest.js experience listed; Node.js is present but the specific framework requested is unconfirmed
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically well-suited to the stack — TypeScript, REST APIs, React, cloud infrastructure, and AI tooling are all present — but the role is scoped at Junior/Mid entry level, while the candidate operates at Staff/Senior level with nearly two decades of experience. Hiring him into this position risks rapid disengagement, mis-leveled compensation expectations, and organizational friction; the fit is strong on skills but structurally misaligned on seniority.
